items.title: Faced with new energy shock, Europe asks if reviving nuclear is the answer
items.dek: As war drives up gas and fuel prices, Europeans turn again to the issue of energy independence.

items.title: After 16 years in power, can Viktor Orban finally be unseated?
items.dek: Hungary is going to the polls in nine days - after 16 years in power, can Viktor Orban be unseated?
